reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to weigh Hunter Williams' 2026-03-29 library framing: "I use tesoffencing as more of a nootropic." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 8:34, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/] Hunter Williams' later library Q&A (2026-06-17) separately says: "you always can add some tesofensine. We forget about teso-fensinine and how good that is." [may-2026-qa-retatrutide-testosterone-autoimmune-and-beyond--ea9ba352 @ 4:52, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/may-2026-qa-retatrutide-testosterone-autoimmune-and-beyond--ea9ba352/]
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "Common side effects people will report are dry mouth, nausea, headache, insomnia, increased heart rate." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 8:02, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/]
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "You're using tesofensine to try to cure depression or alleviate depression. Do not do that." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 11:45, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/]
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "Now, that is complete speculation. I am saying that as a correlation thing that I have noticed, it's not causation." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 20:46, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/] "if you have been on an SSRI recently, currently, or for an extended period of time at some point in your history, probably just go ahead and avoid tesofencing altogether." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 21:18, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/]
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "you're running the risk of potentially damaging sleep more at 500 micrograms, whereas 250 micro grams you might get those sleep benefits that I was talking about." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 10:42, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/]
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "this ability to reduce our appetite, and enhance the feeling of fullness." chronic.dose: Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "Typically, I am always going to recommend people start with 250 micrograms or 0.25 milligrams. Now in studies, they have had people take up to one milligrams a day with no problems whatsoever and only benefits." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 9:08, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/] Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "The sweet spot for most people is going be 500 micro grams, but to be honest, get as good a benefit at 250 grams as I do 500 grams." [how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b @ 9:41, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-use-tesofensine-for-maximum-focus-and-fat-loss--7884029b/] Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "Some people go as high as 500 micro grams. studies, they even go up to like one milligram or 1.5 milligrams, but I like 250 micrograms." [the-best-peptides-for-learning-become-a-supercomputer--9797c575 @ 18:09, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-best-peptides-for-learning-become-a-supercomputer--9797c575/] Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "start really low with the one that we have you can start with one 125 micrograms I Don't feel anything of that." [peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81 @ 8:44, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81/]
chronic.route: Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "And I like 250 micrograms per day taken orally." [the-best-peptides-for-learning-become-a-supercomputer--9797c575 @ 18:09, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-best-peptides-for-learning-become-a-supercomputer--9797c575/]
chronic.frequency: Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "I like 250 micrograms per day taken orally." [the-best-peptides-for-learning-become-a-supercomputer--9797c575 @ 18:09, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-best-peptides-for-learning-become-a-supercomputer--9797c575/] Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "Like 250 micro grams every other day for me That's a sweet spot because it has a long half-life." [peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81 @ 9:16, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81/]
chronic.duration: Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "I do cycle tests with Fencing usually like eight weeks on eight week off." [peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81 @ 8:44, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/peptide-qa-july-2025--936e4b81/]

structured_regimens.quote: Typically, I am always going to recommend people start with 250 micrograms or 0.25 milligrams. Now in studies, they have had people take up to one milligrams a day with no problems whatsoever and only benefits.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: The sweet spot for most people is going be 500 micro grams, but to be honest, get as good a benefit at 250 grams as I do 500 grams.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: Some people go as high as 500 micro grams. studies, they even go up to like one milligram or 1.5 milligrams, but I like 250 micrograms.

structured_regimens.quote: start really low with the one that we have you can start with one 125 micrograms I Don't feel anything of that.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: And I like 250 micrograms per day taken orally.

structured_regimens.quote: I like 250 micrograms per day taken orally.

structured_regimens.quote: Like 250 micro grams every other day for me That's a sweet spot because it has a long half-life.
